** File.....: fltWifiConfig.h.txt                                          **
** Purpose..: Template file to create the real fltWifiConfig.h header file **
**                                                                         **
** Notes....: Copy this file to fltWifiConfig.h and change SSID and        **
**            password to your data there. Do NOT edit this file, this     **
**            file will be ignored by the git to not check in user         **
**            credentials.                                                 **
**                                                                         **
** Copyright (c) 2025-2026 by HA3FLT                                       **
****************************************************************************/

#ifndef STASSID
 #define STASSID    "SSID"
 #define STAPSK     "PASSWORD"
#endif
